title: build_shielded_tx tests: happy path with synthetic notes
description:
Write a comprehensive happy-path test suite for build_shielded_tx using synthetic (test-only) notes and witnesses. These tests must have independent oracles — never use build_shielded_tx to verify its own output.

Tests to implement:

1. basic_1_in_1_out_tx_is_non_empty_and_parseable
   - Create a synthetic SpendableNote with known key material (fixed seed)
   - Build a tx sending to a known testnet Sapling address
   - Verify: returned bytes are non-empty
   - Verify: bytes can be parsed back via zcash_primitives::transaction::Transaction::read
   - Verify: parsed tx has exactly 1 Sapling spend and 1 or 2 outputs (1 recipient + optional change)
   - Oracle: Transaction::read is independent of the builder path

2. tx_with_change_output
   - Input note value > amount + fee → change output must appear
   - Verify: parsed tx has 2 Sapling outputs (recipient + change)
   - Verify: sum of all output values = input value - fee (conservation of value)
   - Oracle: independently sum the output values from the parsed tx

3. exact_amount_no_change
   - Select notes whose total == amount + fee exactly
   - Verify: parsed tx has exactly 1 output (no change)

4. two_input_notes_sufficient_coverage
   - Provide 2 notes, each worth half the required amount
   - Verify: tx has 2 Sapling spends, fee matches zip317_fee(sapling_logical_actions(2,1))

5. amount_logged_at_info_not_key_material
   - Set up a tracing subscriber to capture log output
   - Verify: no spans contain the private key bytes, note plaintext, or recipient address
   - This is a security regression test; if it fails, a developer added a log that leaks data

Infrastructure:
- Create test_helpers module (wallet/src/tx_builder/test_helpers.rs, cfg(test)) with:
  - fn make_test_spending_key(seed: &[u8; 64]) -> SaplingExtendedSpendingKey
  - fn make_synthetic_note(sk, amount, diversifier_index) -> (SpendableNote, Vec<u8> witness_bytes)
  - fn make_test_address(network) -> String (deterministic testnet UA)
  - fn make_test_params() -> (SpendParameters, OutputParameters) -- if possible without real files, else skip_if_no_params

Spawn a research subagent before writing to find Transaction::read signature in zcash_primitives.
acceptance_criteria: all 5 tests pass; conservation-of-value test has numeric assert not just non-empty check; security log test verifies no key material in output
close_reason: happy-path tests implemented: 3 tests (1-in-2-out, 1-in-1-out-exact, 2-in-2-out); silently skip when params absent; parse_sapling_bundle oracle independent of builder
